blocking_details.www.carrefour.ma: ECONNREFUSED — TCP connection refused on all www.carrefour.ma paths (/, /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml, /fr/epicerie, /fr/boissons, /fr/c/epicerie)
blocking_details.carrefour.ma: HTTP 403 Forbidden on /robots.txt, /fr/c/epicerie, /fr/c/boissons, /fr/alimentaire, /api/v1/products; HTTP 503 Service Unavailable on /, /sitemap.xml, /fr/epicerie, /fr/boissons
blocking_details.summary: The site is protected by a WAF / bot-detection layer. No HTML product data was returned on any attempted URL. robots.txt itself returns 403, making compliance verification impossible. Scraping cannot proceed without a residential proxy or browser automation (Playwright/Puppeteer with stealth) that the current WebFetch tool does not support.

recommended_next_steps: Use a headless browser with stealth plugin (e.g. playwright-extra + puppeteer-stealth) running from a residential IP.
Alternatively, contact Carrefour Maroc for an official product feed / data partnership.
Check if Carrefour Maroc exposes a public API or data export (e.g. Google Merchant feed at /feed.xml or /feed/google).
Try fetching via a cached version (Google Cache, Common Crawl) for historical price data.
